body_type_styling_bank_v1.description: Body-type supportive styling guidance with height-aware modifiers. Focus: what tends to look great (by goal), not 'rules'. No shaming, no absolutes.

do: Talk about clothes, lines, balance—not the body.
Give 1–2 strongest ideas by default; expand only if user asks.
If user expresses confidence, affirm first; tweak only if asked.

how_to_use.default_pattern: Reaction → 1 insight (optional) → 1 outfit formula → optional accessory tip → invitation closer.

what_looks_good: Higher waist placement + clean hemlines = instant length.
Tonal/monochrome looks read sleek and elevated.
Smaller-scale prints and cleaner silhouettes (if you want minimal).
quick_wins: Half-tuck or shorter top length to lift the waistline.
Shoes closer to the trouser color to extend the line.

what_looks_good: Most silhouettes work—keep one thing intentional (waistline, layer, or hero accessory).
One fitted + one relaxed piece reads balanced and styled.
quick_wins: If it feels off: tweak tuck/hem/shoe first.

what_looks_good: Wide-leg trousers and maxi lengths look elegant and intentional.
Intentional breaks (belt/color-block) can look very chic.
quick_wins: Add one waist-level anchor (belt/jacket length) to break the line cleanly.

pear.style_intent: Add presence up top + keep the bottom clean and fluid (balance without hiding curves).

tops: Structured shoulders or collars (blazer, shoulder detail, puff sleeve—controlled).
V / scoop / square necklines to open the upper frame.
Brighter or cleaner tops if you want attention higher.
bottoms: High-rise straight, wide-leg, or bootcut (long clean line).
Solid/darker bottoms when you want the top to lead.
A-line or bias skirts that skim with movement.
dresses: Wrap, fit-and-flare, A-line with a defined waist.
outerwear: Cropped jackets at the waist OR long-line layers worn open for vertical lines.

best_bets: Cropped jacket + high-rise straight pant (keeps legs long).
A-line midi with a clean waist seam (not drop-waist).
Top and bottom in similar tones; let neckline/earrings do the focus.
avoid_if_goal_is_balance: Very long tops that end at widest hip point (unless intentionally oversized).

best_bets: Structured top + wide-leg trouser (clean, confident).
Bright top + dark bottom + one hero accessory.
Long-line layer worn open + wide-leg trouser (premium verticals).
Maxi skirt with clean waistband + simple top (elegant balance).

accessory_moves: Statement earrings/necklace to pull focus upward.
Belt at natural waist to make the outfit feel intentional.
Shoes close to pant tone to extend the line.

safe: Structured top + high-rise straight jeans + sleek shoe.
Clean top + dark wide-leg trousers + minimal accessories.
bold: Statement sleeve/top + simple wide-leg bottom + quiet shoes.

hourglass.style_intent: Keep proportions clean; define the waist if you want (without bulky layers).

tops: Wrap tops, fitted knits, clean bodysuits.
V / square / scoop necklines with structure.
dresses: Wrap, sheath, fit-and-flare with waist definition.
outerwear: Tailored blazers, belted coats, layers worn open with shape.

best_bets: Shorter jacket lengths (waist/upper-hip) + high-rise bottoms.
Monochrome base + one crisp accessory (instant polish).
Fitted top + straight pant + structured bag (clean formula).
Long-line coat/blazer + defined waist moment underneath (very premium).
Wide-leg trouser + fitted knit (balanced, elegant).

accessory_moves: Belts (thin/medium) are an easy polish move.

safe: Fitted top + high-rise straight pants + structured bag.
Wrap dress + simple shoe + one clean accessory.
bold: Monochrome base + bold shoe or bag as the hero.

inverted_triangle.style_intent: Keep the top clean and let the lower half add balance (without hiding the upper frame).

tops: Simple necklines; minimal shoulder detailing.
Drapey fabrics or clean shoulder lines.
bottoms: Wide-leg, pleated, A-line skirts; lighter bottoms if you want balance.
dresses: Fit-and-flare, A-line, wrap with gentle skirt volume.
outerwear: Long-line layers worn open; minimal shoulder padding.

best_bets: Clean top + high-rise A-line mini/midi (keeps legs long).
Wide-leg but not too long—hem clean and intentional.
Simple knit + A-line skirt + minimal jewelry.
Wide-leg trouser + clean top + longline layer (effortless balance).
Maxi A-line skirt + fitted top (very elegant).

accessory_moves: Crossbody or bag worn lower can add balance.
Shoes with a little presence can anchor the look.

safe: Clean top + wide-leg trousers + sleek belt.
Simple knit + A-line skirt + minimal jewelry.
bold: Neutral top + patterned bottom + simple shoes.

apple.style_intent: Comfortable structure + vertical lines + easy definition (not restrictive).

tops: V / scoop necklines; open layers; longer tops with clean drape.
Structured-but-soft fabrics that skim, not cling.
bottoms: High-rise straight/wide-leg with a clean front.
A-line or bias skirts with movement.
dresses: Wrap/soft empire-ish waist placement; shifts with vertical seams.
outerwear: Long-line open layers; light coats worn open; vertical seams.

best_bets: Shorter open layer (ends around upper-hip) + high-rise straight pant.
Tonal dressing to keep the line long.
V-neck top + straight trouser + open layer (clean vertical).
Longline open coat + straight trouser (premium verticals).
Monochrome base + statement jacket worn open.

accessory_moves: Lightweight longer necklace/scarf for a vertical line (optional).
Shoes near pant tone lengthen the line.

safe: V-neck top + straight trousers + open layer.
Tonal set + structured bag + clean shoe.
bold: Monochrome base + statement jacket worn open.

rectangle.style_intent: Add shape with waist placement/layering (or go sleek-minimal on purpose).

tops: Wraps, belted shirts, cropped jackets.
Layering that creates a waist moment.
bottoms: High-rise bottoms, pleats, wider legs; skirts with movement.
dresses: Fit-and-flare, belted dresses, slip + layer for shape.
outerwear: Cropped or belted outerwear; long-line worn open.

best_bets: Cropped jacket + high-rise wide-leg (hem clean).
Belted shirt dress with a higher waist seam.
Contrast top/bottom + one clean belt detail (easy shape).
Long-line coat + belt/waist detail underneath (super chic).
Wide-leg trouser + structured top (dimension without fuss).

accessory_moves: Statement earrings or neckline accessory adds dimension.

safe: Belted shirt + straight pants + clean sneaker.
Cropped jacket + high-rise wide-leg + minimal jewelry.
bold: Contrast top/bottom + statement belt + simple shoe.

oval.style_intent: Comfortable structure + vertical lines + clean shoulder fit. Skim, don’t cling.

tops: Open collars, henleys, button-down slightly open.
Structured overshirts/light jackets worn open.
bottoms: Straight or slight taper with a clean waist.
outerwear: Longer open layers; clean lapels; simple bomber/overshirt.

best_bets: Shorter jacket length + straight trouser (no stacking).
Tonal outfit + clean sneaker (length + polish).
Tonal tee + straight trouser + open overshirt (easy upgrade).
Long-line coat + straight trouser (premium vertical).
Relaxed straight trouser + clean knit polo (effortless).

menswear_polish_notes: Shoulder fit is the biggest ‘expensive’ lever.
Clean trouser break (no stacking) looks sharp instantly.

safe: Tonal tee + straight trousers + open overshirt + clean sneaker.
Button-down + straight jeans + loafer/sneaker.
bold: Neutral base + statement jacket (worn open) + simple shoe.

triangle.style_intent: Build presence up top (layering/collar/structure) and keep the lower half clean.

tops: Structured jackets, overshirts, layered looks.
Crew/henley with good shoulder fit.
bottoms: Avoid extreme skinny if balance is the goal.

best_bets: Cropped/waist-length overshirt + straight trouser (keeps it sharp).
Keep layers light—structure without bulk.
Structured jacket + simple tee + dark straight jeans.
Longer overshirt + straight trouser (very premium).
Textured top layer + clean dark bottom (top presence).

menswear_polish_notes: Top structure (collar/layer) is the fastest balance move.
Keep pants clean and simple so the top reads intentional.

safe: Structured jacket + simple tee + dark straight jeans + clean sneaker.
Overshirt + tee + straight trousers + watch.
bold: Statement top layer + neutral base + minimal accessories.

inverted_triangle.style_intent: Keep the upper body clean (not bulky) and balance with straighter/relaxed bottoms.

tops: Clean tees/shirts with minimal shoulder bulk.
Avoid overly tight sleeves if you want softer lines.
bottoms: Straight or relaxed fits to balance proportions.
outerwear: Minimal-shoulder jackets; simple bomber; clean coat.

best_bets: Straight trouser with clean hem + simple top (no extra bulk).
Short bomber/overshirt length (keeps proportions crisp).
Clean shirt + straight trouser + minimal sneaker.
Relaxed straight trouser + clean top + long coat (effortless).
Textured bottom + neutral top (balanced).

menswear_polish_notes: Avoid stacking bulk on top—clean lines read premium.
Straight trousers balance athletic shoulders naturally.

safe: Clean shirt + straight trousers + minimal sneaker.
Tee + relaxed trouser + simple jacket.
bold: Patterned/texture bottom + neutral top + clean shoe.

trapezoid.style_intent: Lean into balanced proportions: clean fits + premium finishing.

tops: Oxford, knit polo, clean tee—fit is the hero.
Most necklines work (choose vibe).
bottoms: Straight or slight taper for a clean line.

best_bets: Slight taper + clean hem + structured top (sharp).
Tonal outfit to lengthen.
Shirt + straight trouser + loafer + watch.
Long coat + wide/straight trouser (very elegant).
Monochrome base + statement outerwear.

menswear_polish_notes: Collar sitting clean makes basics look elevated.

safe: Tonal set + clean sneaker + structured jacket.
Shirt + straight trouser + loafer + watch.
bold: Neutral base + statement shoe or outer layer.

rectangle.style_intent: Add dimension with layers/texture, or go sleek-minimal with sharp fits.

tops: Overshirt/jacket adds shape fast.
Textured knits/collars add dimension.
bottoms: Straight/taper fits; avoid extremes unless style choice.
outerwear: Overshirt, bomber, structured jacket—fit is key.

best_bets: Shorter overshirt length + straight trouser (no stacking).
One texture piece + tonal base.
Textured top + straight trouser + clean sneaker.
Longline layer + straight trouser + clean collar (premium).
Monochrome base + statement jacket.

menswear_polish_notes: One textured piece makes the whole fit feel intentional.
Clean hemlines stop the look from feeling sloppy.

safe: Textured top + straight trouser + clean sneaker.
Tee + overshirt + jeans + watch.

dev_notes: Height modifiers are applied AFTER selecting body type guidance. Use max 1 height snippet per response.
If user didn’t opt into body type: translate to neutral fit goals (vertical line, structure, balance) without labels.
Default output: pick ONE of (best_bets OR one formula). Keep it light, then ask one micro-question.
